reason: helm install --dry-run always requires cluster connection; cannot get NOTES.txt output in container with no k8s. Deprecation tests rely on NOTES.txt content which only renders during helm install, not helm template. The two deprecation tests (test_deprecation_warning_in_notes_template and test_deprecation_warning_for_min_replica) cannot be rewritten to verify actual behavior without modifying the Dockerfile to add a k8s cluster.
